nodes.label: Server Architecture Specification
nodes.rationale: Final architecture for the IoT data server: FastAPI + Nginx + PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB. Defines mTLS for devices, JWT for admins, binary ingest protocol, OTA pull model with 20-slot staged rollout, firmware image storage, and resolved design decisions Q-S1 through Q-S13.

nodes.label: Nginx mTLS Termination (html/nginx/iot_server.conf)
nodes.rationale: Two server{} blocks on port 443 (SNI-selected). Device vhost (api.iot.example.com): private CA, ssl_verify_client on, single /api/v1/weather/ location. Admin vhost (admin.iot.example.com): Let's Encrypt, ssl_verify_client off. Rate limit keyed on $arg_id (10r/s, burst 20).

nodes.label: Database Schema (PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB)
nodes.rationale: Tables: devices (region_id, station_id UNIQUE), weather_records (TimescaleDB hypertable, compressed after 7 days), ingest_log (idempotency key), ota_campaigns (version, firmware_sha256, firmware_size, rollout_start, slot_len_sec, target_cohort_ids, status, success_rate), download_completions (campaign_id, device_id, chunk_index - PRIMARY KEY for idempotency), admin_users. PostgreSQL 17 + TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev.

nodes.label: OTA Staged Rollout Logic
nodes.rationale: 20-slot schedule over 10 days. Slot assignment: dev_slot = zlib.crc32(device_id.encode('ascii')) % num_slots. compute_wait() is pure function - stateless per request, monotone in time. Egress: ~50 devices/slot, ~90 KB/s peak, ~512 MB total over 10 days. Uses Python zlib.crc32 (IEEE 802.3, reflected) - different from firmware CRC-32/MPEG-2.

nodes.label: Firmware Image Storage
nodes.rationale: Stored under html/firmware/ as v{version}.bin. Atomic write (tmp + rename). Version auto-assigned as MAX+1. Size ceiling: 480 KB (HTTP 413 if exceeded). Retention: FIRMWARE_KEEP_N=3 terminal campaigns kept; non-terminal never deleted. SHA-256 recomputed on campaign start for integrity check.

nodes.label: Binary Sensor Ingest Protocol
nodes.rationale: POST /api/v1/weather/upload. Binary packed struct: 5-byte header (uint16 region_id, uint16 station_id, uint8 chunk_count) + 18-byte chunks (Weather_Data_Packed_t). Fixed-point conversion: value/128.0 (S9.7 format, FIXEDPT_FBITS=7). Y2K epoch conversion. Idempotency on (region_id, station_id, first_sample_timestamp).

nodes.label: mTLS Device Authentication
nodes.rationale: Entire fleet shares one client certificate - no per-device CN. Device identity from application payload (region_id/station_id) or ?id=rrrsss query param only. Nginx validates client cert against private CA + CRL, forwards X-SSL-Client-Verify header. FastAPI checks this header.

nodes.label: Server Design Decisions (Q-S1 through Q-S13)
nodes.rationale: All resolved: Q-S1 URL under /api/v1/weather/, Q-S2 firmware W./id= params, Q-S3 rate limit by $arg_id, Q-S4 keep last N terminal firmware, Q-S5 success_rate at status-change, Q-S6 ceiling division, Q-S7 region/station crop %1000, Q-S8 cancelled not rolled_back, Q-S9 separate SNI listeners, Q-S10 NULL=entire fleet, Q-S11 absolute FIRMWARE_DIR, Q-S12 PG17+TSDB from source, Q-S13 download_completions table.
